markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Bizly and GrowthX for scaling organic content and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bizly is pivoting from enterprise-focused to broad-based market (SMB customers and venues)](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [GrowthX offers content engine building and scaling, with SEO as a key focus but not limited to it](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Bizly needs fast results (6-month timeline) and a streamlined approach due to lean team structure](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [GrowthX's typical 6-8 week strategy sprint may need adjustment for Bizly's urgent timeline](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)

## Topics

### Bizly's Current Situation and Goals

  - [Transitioning from enterprise-only to broad market (SMB customers and venues)](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [No existing organic growth motion; starting from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Aiming for free product adoption with venue-side monetization (similar to DoorDash/Airbnb model)](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [Partnerships in place (e.g., Booking.com) to support customer-side acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Key goal: Consistent lead generation, free sign-ups, and platform usage](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Offerings

  - [Focus on building and scaling content engines, not limited to SEO](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Typical engagement: 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by 12-month execution ($15K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [Ability to show traffic impact around month 3, with deeper insights by months 4-5](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
  - [Use of AI and human elements to calibrate and scale content production](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Programmatic content creation capabilities (e.g., location-based landing pages)](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)

### Potential Collaboration Challenges

  - [Bizly's lean structure ("one-person unicorn company" model) vs. GrowthX's typical process](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Time constraints: Bizly needs to start execution by July 1st for year-end targets](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Bizly's preference for a shorter strategy phase (2 weeks) conflicts with GrowthX's standard 6-8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

### SEO Landscape and Content Strategy

  - [Shifting search behavior from Google to AI-powered chat solutions](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=606.0)
  - [Long-tail nature of SEO, but potential for quicker results with strategic content scaling](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Importance of technical SEO and website architecture in content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to consider adjusting strategy sprint timeline to meet Bizly's urgent needs](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - Share GrowthX's Statement of Work (SOW) for Bizly's review
  - [Bizly to potentially speak with GrowthX customers for perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Explore possibility of a 6-month initial engagement with performance review](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide more details on programmatic content creation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/nvW1H7KLTHM3wJxn2Qv26FbMWbcasxG_?tab=summary&timestamp=1653.0)
